meta.title: Careers at GateCtr
meta.description: Join the team building the intelligent gateway for every LLM request.

hero.headline: Build the infrastructure for AI.
hero.description: We're a small, focused team building the middleware layer that every AI-powered product needs. If you care about developer experience, reliability, and shipping fast — we want to hear from you.

why.label: Why GateCtr
why.headline: What it's like to work here.
why.description: We're remote-first, move fast, and give everyone ownership over what they build.

items.title: Remote-first
items.body: Work from anywhere. We're async by default and trust you to manage your time. No mandatory standups, no micromanagement.

items.title: Real ownership
items.body: Small team means high impact. You'll own features end-to-end, from design to deployment. Your work ships to production fast.

items.title: Competitive compensation
items.body: Market-rate salary, equity, and benefits. We believe in paying people fairly for the value they create.

items.title: Learning budget
items.body: $2,000/year for courses, conferences, and books. We invest in your growth because it's good for everyone.

items.title: Modern stack
items.body: Next.js, TypeScript, PostgreSQL, Redis. We use the best tools for the job and keep the codebase clean.

items.title: Meaningful work
items.body: Every feature you ship helps developers save real money and ship better AI products. The impact is direct and measurable.

empty.title: No open positions right now.
empty.body: We're not actively hiring, but we're always interested in exceptional people.

culture.label: Culture
culture.headline: We ship. We learn. We improve.
culture.body: We're not a company that talks about culture — we just try to do good work, treat each other well, and build something developers actually love. If that sounds like your kind of place, reach out.
